page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 48 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor, operating at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, eliminating resource contention from simultaneous multithreading.

The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. This dense memory allocation makes the instance suitable for memory-intensive workloads. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r8a.12xlarge offers a high density of RAM relative to compute resources, optimizing licensing and infrastructure costs for workloads that require large memory footprints without needing proportional scaling of CPU cores. The hardware profile is designed for memory-bound applications, including in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and data analytics pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.12xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs across 48 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance provides 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not feature local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage options, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed to support memory-intensive enterprise applications, in-memory databases, and large-scale data processing tasks where high memory density is required relative to compute capacity.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high RAM density for demanding enterprise database and caching workloads.

384.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor virtualization on x86_64 architecture
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and data analytics
